description: Specifies the cross-section slice position along a solid's profile for revolve operations. Value is normalized 0-1 where 0 is the start and 1 is the end of the profile.
utility: Set cross-section slice position for solids of revolution

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Slice position along the profile (0 to 1, default 0.5 = midpoint)

examples.expression: revolvewasher(at(2,1), view(17,16.9), region_1, region_2, axis(x), fc(red), sweep(0,360), slice(0.5))
revolvedisk(at(2,1), view(21,26), region_1, axis(y), fc(blue), slice(0.3))
